name: Gangaji
bio: Gangaji, born Merle Antoinette Roberson, is an American spiritual teacher in the Advaita Vedanta lineage. She met her teacher Sri Harilal Poonja (Papaji) in India in 1990, who was a direct disciple of Ramana Maharshi. Since then she has traveled the world offering satsang and sharing the invitation to recognize the freedom and fulfillment of one's true nature. She is the author of 'The Diamond in Your Pocket' and 'Hidden Treasure.' She founded the Gangaji Foundation in Ashland, Oregon.
